findings.title: Non-atomic balance update in deposit
findings.description: Read-modify-write on self.balance without synchronization allows concurrent deposits to overwrite each other

findings.title: TOCTOU in withdraw balance check
findings.description: Balance check and subtraction are not atomic, allowing concurrent withdrawals to overdraw the account

findings.title: Non-atomic cross-account transfer
findings.description: Transfer checks source balance then modifies two accounts without synchronization, breaking conservation invariant

findings.title: TOCTOU in ticket reservation
findings.description: Availability check and decrement are not atomic, allowing overselling of tickets

findings.title: TOCTOU in inventory order processing
findings.description: Stock check and decrement are not atomic, allowing inventory to go negative under concurrent orders

findings.title: Non-thread-safe singleton initialization
findings.description: ConfigCache singleton uses unsynchronized __new__ and __init__, allowing multiple instances or partial initialization

findings.title: File-based TOCTOU counter
findings.description: File read-increment-write without file locking allows concurrent threads to lose counter increments
